label: negative
source: Synthetic construction based on WET probe (research/token-probes/wet-WETZjtp.md) and RAY/PYTH corpus (research/fixtures/solana-corpus-phase1.md)
note_on_two_variants: This fixture contains two variant sub-cases: VARIANT_A (PYTH) and VARIANT_B (RAY). VARIANT_A tests Signal A fires + Signal C correctly suppressed. VARIANT_B documents the known outstanding FP gap where Signal C is NOT suppressed for RAY.

variant_a.label: VARIANT_A_PYTH_signal_c_suppressed

baseline_7d.note: PYTH has sustained ~$5M/day DEX volume as an oracle protocol token

swaps_1h.note: News event: Pyth oracle expands to new chain. 28M in 1h.

market_cap.note: PYTH FDV >> $60M. Market cap filter triggers. Signal A/B/C not evaluated.

signal_evaluation.signal_c_suppressed_by_established_proto: N/A — market cap filter triggers first

expected_output.note: PYTH market cap >> $60M. Detector exits at market cap check. For the purpose of validating Signal C suppression logic specifically, the developer should construct a lower-cap variant (see unit_test_note below).

variant_a.unit_test_note: To test Signal C suppression for PYTH specifically (bypassing the market cap filter in unit tests), construct a test with is_established_protocol=true and assert Signal C amplifier is not applied. The evidence key pump_dump/established_protocol_suppressed_signal_c should equal '1' when Signal A or B fires on an established protocol.

variant_b.label: VARIANT_B_RAY_known_fp_gap
variant_b.known_gap_description: RAY is not suppressed by is_established_protocol (jup_verified=false, not jup_strict, rugcheck_score=56 >= 40). Signal C fires on RAY treasury sells. This is a documented FP requiring Sprint 5 calibration task to extend the predicate.

token_meta.note: Neither jup_strict nor (jup_verified && score < 40) → is_established_protocol = false. Same pattern as documented in token_status.rs module doc.

baseline_7d.note: Synthetic baseline: RAY has ~$25M/day DEX volume

swaps_1h.note: Synthetic: Raydium governance vote triggers 8× volume spike in 1h

market_cap.note: RAY FDV >> $60M. Market cap filter triggers. Provided for completeness.

treasury_sell_post_spike.note: Raydium treasury sells RAY for operational expenses following the governance vote

signal_evaluation.resolution: Extend is_established_protocol predicate in Sprint 5 to include RAY. Options: (a) manual allowlist of known established tokens; (b) third branch based on token age > 180 days + minimum holder count + minimum CEX listing count.

expected_output.note: Market cap filter prevents evaluation. In a hypothetical unit test where the filter is bypassed: Signal A fires, Signal C fires (FP), established_protocol_suppressed_signal_c is NOT set (gap). expected_correct=false documents this gap.

variant_b.todo: Sprint 5 calibration task: extend is_established_protocol predicate for RAY pattern (jup_verified=false, established-in-practice). Reference: token_status.rs module doc outstanding FP note.
